metadata.description: Self-hosted marketplace for algebraic-filter — an additive +α PostToolUse hook that adds algebraic-law + data-movement verification on top of any base quality tooling.

plugins.name: algebraic-filter
plugins.description: Algebraic-law-level machine verification guardrail for AI-generated Python code. Detects Monoid/Functor/Monad-law violations + data-movement defects that lint/type-checkers miss, and feeds structured feedback back to Claude for self-correction. Composes additively on top of ruff/pyright/other hooks.
